title: Muheza District Council (Fees and Charges) By-Laws, 2001
title_en: Muheza District Council (Fees and Charges) By-Laws, 2001

provisions.title: Title and application
provisions.content: These By-laws may be cited as the Muheza District Council (Fees and Charges) By-laws, 2001 and shall come into operation on the 1 st day of January, 2002 and shall apply throughout the area of jurisdiction of the Council .

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these By-laws:— " the Act " means the Local Government Finance Act, 1982; " Council " means the Muheza District Council; " building materials " include all forms of rocks, gravel, stones, clay sand lime or any other material used for construction of buildings roads, dams, aerodromes and similar work.

provisions.title: Imposition of fees and charges
provisions.content: There shall be Fees and Charges payable to the Council by any person in respect of the licences or permits issued by the Council or services rendered by the Council and the said fees and charges shall be determined by the Council from time to time. The fees and charges levied by the Council shall be payable in advance.

provisions.title: Offences
provisions.content: Any person who refuses to pay Fees and Charges stipulated in the Schedules to these by-laws is guilty of an offence and shall be liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding five thousand shillings or to imprison­ment not exceeding six months or to both such fine and imprisonment. First Schedule Fees and Charges for building materials from queries within the District:— 1. Vehicle of sand, seven tones Shs. 1,500/= per trip 2. Vehicle of Aggregates, seven tones Shs. 1.500/= per trip 3. Vehicle of murrain, seven tones Shs. 1,500/= per trip Second Schedule Mining Fees: 1. Fees for mining out of one pegged claim area Shs. 5,000/= 2. Mining without permit; 1st penalty Shs. 5,000/= 3. Mining without permit; 2nd penalty onwards Shs. 10,000/= Third Schedule Parking charges at Muheza Townships, Maramba, Daluni, Duga Trading Centres: (i) Passenger bus for 60 people and above Shs. 60/= per day (ii) Mini Bus Shs. 50/= per day (iii) Pick - Up Shs. 30/= per day (iv) Sub-Trailer Shs. 70/= per day (v) 7-10 tons lorry Shs. 70/= per day Forth Schedule Permit Fees for Cultural Activities: (i) Permit for holding commercial dance Shs. 5,000/= per day (ii) Permit for holding festival dance Shs. 500/= per day (iii) Permit for holding commercial disco Shs. 3,000/= per day (iv) Permit for holding festival disco Shs. 500/= per day (v) Permit for holding commercial cultural and traditional Ngoma Shs. 2,000/= per day (vi) Permit for Magic Show Shs. 400/= per day (vii) Permit for Cinema Shs. 3,000/= per day (viii) Permit for Video Show Shs. 7,000/= per day (ix) Permit for holding traditional doctors practising traditional medicines Shs. 2,000/= per day (x) Permit for holding festival cultural and traditional Ngoma Shs. 100/= per day Fifth Schedule Charges and Fishing activities: 1. Fishermen to continue paving Fishing licenses 2. Fish Marketing to pay trading licenses Examining the Health of food handlers and Barmaids: Food handlers Shs. 3.000/= per person every six months Bar-maid Shs. 3,000/= per person every six months Intoxicating Drinks: Application for sale of Local Liquor Shs. 2.000/= per application "Puya" Selling Shs. 200/= per tin Seventh Schedule Building permit and Inspection fees: (a) Building permit Shs. 2.500/= per each (b) Inspection of building under construction:— (i) spection of dug out trench for foundation Shs. 600 = per each (ii) Inspection of the built up foundation Shs. 600 = per each (iii) Inspection of the walls up to window level Shs. 600 = per each (iv) Inspection of the walls up to wall plate Shs. 500 = per each (v) Inspection of the roof and roofing Shs. 500 = per each (c) Fees for transferring of rights Shs. 1.000 = per each Eighth Schedule Cutting Roads or Highways:— Fees for cutting (excavating across) Roads or Highway Shs. 3.000 = Nineth Schedule Road user Charges:— Fees and Charges for vehicles carrying timber or logs: 1. Vehicle less than seven tons Shs. 500/= per trip 2. Vehicle of seven tons capacity Shs. 700 '= per trip 3. Vehicle above seven tons Shs. 900 '= per trip Tenth Schedule Application for inspection of building for business licence Application fees Shs. 100/= per inspection Eleventh Schedule Petroleum products user charges: Petrol -/50 cts. per litre Diesel -/25 cts per litre Paraffin -/25 cts per litre History of this document 31 May 2002 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 22 15 April 2002 Assented to 01 January 2002 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
